title: Brackenbury Primary School: 22 October 2025
body: "Decision reference: VAR2643 and VAR2644  Type of decision:   variation to admission arrangements for September 2025 – approved variation to admission arrangements for September 2026 – approved   School type: community  School phase: primary  Local authority: Hammersmith and Fulham  Admission authority: London Borough of Hammersmith and Fulham Council "
